channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Trump Travels to China on Air Force One with Key Officials Amid Iran Tensions
item.description: President Donald Trump has embarked on a high-profile visit to China, where he is scheduled to meet Chinese President Xi Jinping to discuss pressing issues, including the ongoing Iran conflict and tra...

item.title: Evaluating the Use and Necessity of Robotic Surgery in Indian Hospitals
item.description: Robotic surgery is increasingly being adopted by private hospitals across India, but experts caution that it is not always necessary. The procedure involves a surgeon controlling robotic arms through ...

item.title: The Rise of At-Home Vaginal Microbiome Testing and Its Implications
item.description: A growing number of women are using at-home vaginal microbiome tests to monitor and improve their vaginal health, often motivated by recurring infections, fertility concerns, or curiosity. Startups li...

item.title: Four Students Killed, Three Injured by Lightning on Panthallur Hill in Kerala
item.description: On Tuesday evening, a tragic incident occurred in Malappuram district, Kerala, when four students lost their lives after being struck by lightning atop the Panthallur hill near Mankada. A total of sev...

item.title: PMDC Makes MDCAT and Registration Mandatory for Students Planning Medical Education Abroad
item.description: The Pakistan Medical and Dental Council (PMDC) has announced that all Pakistani students planning to pursue medical or dental education abroad must first pass the Medical and Dental College Admission ...

item.title: Orlando Pirates on the brink of ending Sundowns' eight-year PSL reign after Magesi upset
item.description: Orlando Pirates are on the verge of clinching the 2025-26 Betway Premiership title, set to end Mamelodi Sundowns' remarkable eight-year winning streak. Sundowns faced a shocking 3-2 defeat to Magesi F...

item.title: Fashion Portraits of Pattie Boyd Highlighting 1960s London Style
item.description: Pattie Boyd emerged as one of the most iconic faces of British fashion during the Swinging Sixties. With her long golden hair, wide eyes, and effortless elegance, she embodied the era's ideals of beau...

item.title: Exploring Psilocybin as a Potential Treatment for OCD
item.description: Adam Strauss, a successful digital entrepreneur and trained musician, struggled with severe obsessive-compulsive disorder (OCD), which made even minor decisions, like choosing an MP3 player, paralyzin...

item.title: White House Officials Express Frustration with Trump's Leadership in Undercover Footage
item.description: Undercover footage released by right-wing journalist James O'Keefe shows several White House staffers expressing frustration with President Donald Trump's management style. Benjamin Elliston, a senior...

item.title: APM Governorship Candidate Withdraws to Support Oyebanji in Ekiti 2026 Election
item.description: For Ekiti State, the Allied Peoples Movement (APM) governorship candidate, Joseph Anifowose, don withdraw from the 2026 election and show support for current Governor Biodun Oyebanji ahead of next mon...

item.title: Undisclosed Budget Items in 2026 Federal Budget
item.description: The 2026 federal budget, spanning over 1,500 pages, still leaves several key spending figures undisclosed. Certain items have been withheld from publication, often for reasons ranging from commercial ...

item.title: Kenya Hosts Africa-France Summit with PM Sara Zaafrani Zenzri Attending
item.description: On Tuesday, Prime Minister Sara Zaafrani Zenzri attended the opening session of the Africa-France Summit held at the Kenyatta International Conference Centre in Nairobi, Kenya. The summit carried the ...

item.title: Trump Names Acting FDA Director After Marty Makary Departs Amid Controversy
item.description: President Donald Trump announced a leadership change at the Food and Drug Administration (FDA) on May 12, 2026, appointing Kyle Diamantas as acting commissioner following the departure of FDA Commissi...

item.title: SEC Coaches Criticize Ole Miss Amid Recruiting and Academic Controversies
item.description: Ole Miss continues to draw criticism from coaches across the SEC following recent comments and controversies surrounding its football program. Lane Kiffin, now LSU's head coach, faced backlash for rem...

item.title: Alice Faye: Iconic Portraits of the Hollywood Star in the 1930s
item.description: Alice Faye, born Alice Jeanne Leppert on May 5, 1915, was a major Hollywood musical star and singer known as the 'Queen of Fox' at 20th Century-Fox during the 1930s. She transitioned from Broadway cho...

item.title: Tanzania secures duty-free entry to China for all exports under new Africa zero-tariff framework
item.description: Tanzania has officially gained duty-free access to the Chinese market under a new zero-tariff policy that covers 100% of tariff lines for African countries with diplomatic relations. The policy starte...

item.title: Ensuring Fairness in AI: Addressing Bias Inherited from Historical Data
item.description: Artificial intelligence (AI) systems increasingly influence decisions in sectors such as employment, education, finance, and criminal justice. Ensuring these systems operate fairly is far more complex...

item.title: Coco Martin Shares Details About Julia Montes Scene in 'Sigabo' Pilot Episode
item.description: The pilot episode of the upcoming TV series “Sigabo” has sparked interest among fans, especially with talks about a possible kissing scene involving Julia Montes. Coco Martin, who is closely associate...

item.title: Canvas Resolves Data Breach Incident Following Cyberattack on Global Universities
item.description: Instructure, the parent company of Canvas, a widely used learning management platform in postsecondary institutions, confirmed that it has reached an agreement with the hacking group ShinyHunters afte...

item.title: FBI Director Kash Patel and Senator Chris Van Hollen clash over drinking allegations during Senate hearing
item.description: During a tense Senate Appropriations Committee hearing on May 12, 2026, FBI Director Kash Patel clashed with Senator Chris Van Hollen over allegations of excessive drinking and unexplained absences by...
